items.title: How to Make Golden Milk
items.summary: The Golden Latte (Two Ways) /* Base typography matching your system design */ body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI",…
items.content_html:
The Golden Latte (Two Ways)

The Golden Latte (Two Ways)

Golden milk is a soothing, anti-inflammatory drink. In this recipe, you'll learn how to prepare it using either a traditional dairy base or a delicious plant-based alternative.

Ingredients

  • Liquid Base (Choose One):
    • 1 cup Raw or Organic Milk (dairy-based)
    • 1 cup Coconut Milk (plant-based)
  • 1 tsp Turmeric
  • 1 pinch of Black Pepper
  • 1 pinch of Sea Salt
  • Cinnamon
  • Ginger
  • Sweetener (to taste)
  • Optional Healthy Fats:
    • ½ tsp Ghee (recommended for raw milk variation)
    • ½ tsp Coconut Oil (recommended for coconut milk variation)
Customization Tip: Feel free to add or swap other aromatic spices to your batch, such as cloves, cardamom, or nutmeg.

Instructions

  1. Combine your chosen liquid base (raw milk or coconut milk) and any optional fat (ghee or coconut oil) into a small saucepan.
  2. Whisk in the turmeric, black pepper, sea salt, cinnamon, ginger, and sweetener of your choice.
  3. Place the saucepan over medium-low heat and bring the liquid to a low simmer. Do not let it boil.
  4. Maintain the low simmer for 5 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally to let the spices infuse.
  5. Remove from the pan from the heat and pour the latte into a mug. Enjoy hot or warm.

items.title: How to Stop a Cold Sore Fast
items.summary: Feel a cold sore coming? If you are currently experiencing an outbreak or feel one coming and are looking for…
items.content_html:
Feel a cold sore coming? If you are currently experiencing an outbreak or feel one coming and are looking for a quick fix, you can use things that you likely have lying around.

Apply ice to the area for at least 5 minutes to cool down the tingling and slow down the outbreak. Once you've iced the area, apply some toothpaste and leave it on overnight. You can put a pimple patch or tiny band aid over the toothpaste if you don't want it to be messy while you sleep or if you simply don't want anyone to ask too many questions. Doing this stops the breakout in its tracks. If you already have an existing breakout, you can still do the same, but with a bit more persistence since the sore is already there. You can also apply some pure tea tree oil diluted with a bit of coconut oil or olive oil to dry out the cold sore faster. Please remember to wash your hands thoroughly with warm, soapy water before and after touching the affected area for at least 30 seconds.

items.title: You can say goodbye to cold sores forever. Yes, it is actually possible. For real.
items.summary: Have you ever had a cold sore? Has it made you feel embarrassed about being seen? Well, guess what? You're…
items.content_html:
Have you ever had a cold sore? Has it made you feel embarrassed about being seen? Well, guess what? You're not alone. And for so long you've had the burning question: Could cold sores ever go away? Well, the answer is yes! And, it's so much simpler than you think.

Listen, we just want you to know that you don't have to live with this issue anymore. You can actually do something good and permanent about it. There is hope. No longer would you have to feel insecure about going on dates or anxious about choosing a partner. No longer do you have to be worried about a breakout sneaking up on you. No longer do you have to keep a bunch of medicated lip balms lying around just in case. You don't have to accept this as your norm anymore. This may sound too good to be true and you are not at fault for thinking that. In fact, most people believe that there is no way to heal. After all, you've been told by countless medical professionals and Google searches that there is no cure. Well, the truth is, any disease can be healed.

According to the World Health Organization, approximately 64% of people around the world suffer from this annoying and embarrassing matter. The hard truth is: the culprit for those pesky breakouts is the herpes simplex virus or herpes for short. Breakouts can happen on your face or even…down there. While there are are about eight types of herpes, there are two main ones: HSV 1 and HSV 2. HSV 1 typically causes sores on the face while HSV 2 causes sores on the genital area. HSV 1 is the most common. Herpes is so sinister that you may have never had a cold sore outbreak, yet it is still possible that this virus is quietly using you as a host, making you asymptomatic. We believe that a great number of people carry this virus silently without knowing it because it's possible to contract it from people you don't even know have it. That's because the virus still sheds without symptoms present. You might think it's no big deal since you don't get blisters or since you've managed to get rid of your outbreaks; however, for some, this virus can lead to more serious complications such as keratitis, encephalitis, meningitis, dementia, blindness, and other disorders. HSV can also increase your chance of contracting and transmitting HIV. You might be thinking "I haven't had an outbreak in years!" Well, that's wonderful, but that does not mean that the virus isn't lying around dormant in your nervous system. You may one day encounter a very stressful period in your life and then suddenly you feel a tingle. The thing about the herpes virus is that it likes to hide out in discreet places in your body. It hijacks your cells, replicates rapidly and silently as it reshapes your DNA and causes damage.

In 2021, Marla Paul wrote in an article at Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine that, "more than half of U.S. adults are carriers of HSV1 (herpes simplex virus type 1) which hibernates in the peripheral nervous system and can never be eradicated." For decades, almost every single article or piece of literature have concluded that there is no cure for herpes. And, you too, have believed this to be true and have accepted a life sentence, subscribing to an indefinite membership of synthetic herpes medications. Frankly, most of those drugs are only meant to treat or suppress the sores. They are only designed to address surface symptoms and not the deep rooted causes of illness. And, honestly, that is just a form of imprisonment. Many even think that supplements like L-lysine healed them. The bad news is that, it hasn't. L-lysine is just an amino acid that blocks the outbreaks from physically manifesting but the virus is still laying low in your body. The good news is that this virus, though it has been deemed "incurable" for decades, is possible to eliminate. Now, while there is some truth that there is no "cure" to the herpes simplex virus (because you can't necessarily kill the virus), you can find it's hiding place and escort it out of your body. It is actually so much more straightforward than you think. That is why we created a step-by-step, easy to follow protocol (including videos and images) on how to locate and eradicate this virus and kick it out of your body for good. No bs. No fluff. Just a clear strategic plan. You can achieve real and lasting results. You'll not only be able to get rid of the virus, but you may find relief from other ailments as well. That is a win, win.

After years of research and dedication to disintegrating the myth that there is no way to heal from herpes, we have finally discovered and understood how this disease-causing virus operates and how to find and eliminate it. After dedicating over a year of research, we have compounded lots of information to get to this point, but won't bore you with pages upon pages of research details. Instead, we've managed to summarize the meat and potatoes—the most important aspects—for you. This has been so exciting because we are able to help people who have been desperate for a solution for a very long time. This was made with pure love and intention, just for you because you deserve it. You deserve to live a life of freedom. You deserve to be happy. You deserve to see the light at the end of the tunnel and we can't be more ecstatic for you! This is for the person who has tried countless different ways to heal and is on the verge of giving up and just accepting their fate, but just know that "the most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time." —Thomas Edison. Try one more time. You can get through this despite popular belief. You have power over your health. Take back control today!

Alright, so now here's the exciting part! A very significant ingredient in our protocol that we use is carvacrol. This is the secret sauce. It just works, period. Carvacrol is a powerful and natural antiviral, antifungal, and antimicrobial polyphenol agent that is found in very few herbs. And, with no side effect that is comparable to synthetic pharmaceutical medications but it must be used correctly. You will learn how to use it effectively in the protocol. The main and most common plant that contains potent carvacrol is oregano. But not just any oregano. There are two main kinds of oregano: Greek and Mexican. Mexican oregano is very well known. Most people use it in their seasoning rotation or on their favorite pizza; however, Mexican oregano has a very low and sometimes zero carvacrol content. Greek oregano, on the other hand, is true liquid gold. It grows wild in rocky and sunny Mediterranean hills and has a much higher carvacrol content averaging around 70%. Other alternative herbs that include high carvacrol content include thyme (specifically the thymus captitatus species) and Dittany of Crete. These are both Greek plants as well.

In our protocol, we will be using 100% Greek oil of oregano (also known as oregano essential oil), not the same as oregano oil. There is a very big difference. It is also important to note that oil of oregano should be wild, steam distilled, 100% pure, undiluted and should have a Certificate of Analysis (COA) document to verify the potency, purity, and safety of the batch. There are plenty of oregano oils on the market with many claiming that their product is lab tested but have no COA and are often pre-diluted with olive oil or other oils. Additionally, many of them are not made from the plant species Origanum vulgare ssp. hirtum, which is true Greek oregano. We have found probably the best available oil of oregano product that is made and packaged in Greece but if you prefer to source your own, we encourage you to browse around to find other high quality alternatives as well, including Thymus Captitatus and Dittany of Crete. When selecting oil of oregano, you should know the species, the source (where it's grown), the carvacrol percentage, and the expiration date. For a limited time, we have included a complimentary full size oil with the purchase of our protocol at no additional cost to you. While supplies last!

In the protocol, you'll learn the specific ways that oil of oregano must be administered in order to expose and attack the herpes simplex virus. You will also be guided with exactly the types of foods and other supporting herbs to consume. Additionally, there are some vital steps that must be taken prior to using the oil, but don't worry at all. You will learn exactly what to do in the protocol. We're confident that you can get through it as long as you follow the instructions and stick to the plan. And, now that you have some insight, let's kick some…virass! You get it? Ah! Corny, we know. Anyway, if you are ready to kick the virus out and be freed from the stigma and shame, then you are at the right place. We wrapped up the Beta phase of this protocol and are releasing Phase One very soon. Join the waitlist now and secure your priority spot today.

Break the Cycle. For Good.

Be the first to be notified when the protocol is live.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about the protocols, resources, and securing your spot.

Can the virus come back if I stop eating healthy? +
No, a poor diet itself does not spontaneously recreate the virus. However, if your body's immune defenses become compromised or clogged by poor health habits, pathogens can thrive much more easily. It is also important to remember that once your system is clean, you can still contract the virus again if you are re-exposed through physical contact. Think twice before your next close encounter or one-night stand—protection and awareness remain your best long-term shields.
How long does this process take to get rid of the virus? +
There is no universal, exact timeline. Your individual journey depends entirely on your current IgG test metrics, cellular baseline, and how strictly you adhere to the protocol layout. This is a comprehensive detoxification process, not a quick-fix gimmick. You are target-clearing a pathogen that has been deeply rooted for a long time. Be patient with your body, give yourself grace, and allow time to heal—the lasting relief is worth the sacrifice.
Can I leave a video or audio testimonial instead of writing? +
Absolutely! We highly encourage you to send us your voice recordings and videos. We are actively running a beta program for multimedia reviews and would love to feature your journey. Sharing how you felt before and after completing the steps is incredibly impactful, though recording just your results afterward is completely fine too. We want to amplify real voices of real individuals experiencing true physical transformations.
Can I make my testimonial anonymous? +
Yes, 100%. Your absolute privacy is our highest priority, especially given the sensitive nature of health tracking. Please feel completely secure sharing your progress using just initials, a pseudonym, or keeping it entirely anonymous. Your results will inspire others even without revealing your identity.
Do I get a free oil with my purchase? +
Yes! For a limited time, every single order of the protocol system includes a free, full-size bottle of pure, undiluted wild Greek oil of oregano—complete with an official Certificate of Analysis (COA) for verified potency. This bonus is available strictly while promotional supplies last.
What's included in the limited-time bundle offer? +
You receive the comprehensive, step-by-step master system PDF guide ($97 value) paired with a free full-size bottle of pure, premium wild Greek oil of oregano ($25 value) to kickstart your cleanse immediately. That is a total value of $122, all for just a single one-time payment of $97 while inventory lasts.
Is the shipping free? +
Yes, absolutely. Your pure wild oregano oil is packed securely and shipped right to your physical address with 100% free tracking and shipping. There are no hidden fees or handling surcharges added at checkout.
Is there a money back guarantee? +
Due to the immediate digital delivery and nature of this protocol system, all sales are final and we do not issue refunds. We have poured extensive research, step-by-step clarity, and raw value into this program to ensure you have a clear pathway to natural health. We ask that you commit fully to the process before purchasing—the lasting relief and long-term results are worth your dedication.
